Election Resources
Mail-in Ballot
Pennsylvania voters now have the option of mail-in ballots. The state webpage has detailed information regarding the process.
Click here to view.
The application can be
filled out online
or
downloaded and mailed
.
Check Voter Registration Status
If you have registered to vote, check your
Voter Registration Status here
.
If you are not registered to vote,
you may do so here
.
Poll Workers
Susquehanna County Needs Poll Workers
If you are interested in being part of this important democratic process, please contact the Susquehanna County Voter Registration department at 570.278.6697. For general information regarding what poll workers do and how to become one, please
view this State resource
.
